WORTH-IT / SKIP-IT METHOD™
① Still-There Test
Exists meaningfully — not just ruins or a locked gate.
② Worth-It Test
Delivers real value for a first-timer, not just hype.
③ Regret Test
Skipping it would create genuine, lasting regret.
📲 Download offline maps before Texas Panhandle, New Mexico & Mojave — limited cell coverage.
